title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Quikr

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Quikr
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quikr family as a Software Engineer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quikr:
Quikr is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr!
